news.title: Jyske Bank (CPSE:JYSK) Valuation Check After Strong 1 Year Return And Recent Pullback
news.summary: How Jyske Bank stock has been performing Jyske Bank (CPSE:JYSK) has drawn investor attention after a solid 1 year total return of 53.6%, set against a recent pullback, with the stock down 3.2% over the past month and 8.9% in the past 3 months. news.summary: Jyske Bank AS (JYSKY) reports a solid DKK 17 EPS and a strong CET1 ratio of 15.9%, while navigating market volatility and geopolitical uncertainties.

news.title: Ledende medarbejderes og disses nærtståendes transaktioner
Jyske Bank Capital Changes Shape Future Shareholder Returns And Earnings Outlook
news.summary: Jyske Bank shareholders approved a reduction in share capital at an Extraordinary General Meeting. The meeting also backed amendments to the Articles of Association, including language changes for annual reports.
